import boto3
from redis import Redis


def handle_order_event(event: dict) -> dict:
    db = DatabaseConnection("postgresql://localhost/orders")
    cache = Redis(host="localhost", port=6379)
    s3 = boto3.client("s3")
    queue = SQSClient("order-queue")
    
    order = db.fetch(event["order_id"])
    cached = cache.get(f"order:{order['id']}")
    if cached:
        return cached
    
    result = process_order(order)
    cache.set(f"order:{order['id']}", result)
    return result


def run_batch_job(batch_id: str) -> dict:
    db = DatabaseConnection("postgresql://localhost/batch")
    cache = Redis(host="localhost", port=6379)
    logger = setup_logger("batch")
    metrics = MetricsClient()
    
    items = db.query(f"SELECT * FROM items WHERE batch_id = '{batch_id}'")
    return {"processed": len(items)}
